game.path: ./Star Wars Jedi Knight - Dark Forces II.sh
game.name: Star Wars Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II
game.desc: Star Wars Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II is a 1997 first-person action game developed and published by LucasArts. Play as Kyle Katarn, a mercenary turned Jedi, battling the Dark Jedi Jerec across seven episodes with lightsaber combat, Force powers, and multiplayer support.

game.path: ./Star Wars Jedi Knight - Mysteries of the Sith.sh
game.name: Star Wars Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith
game.desc: Star Wars Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith is a 1998 first-person action expansion pack developed and published by LucasArts. Play as Mara Jade, a former Emperor's Hand turned Jedi apprentice, alongside a returning Kyle Katarn, battling the Dark Side across fourteen missions with new Force powers, an expanded arsenal, and upgraded multiplayer combat.
